description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits SNAPSHOT_OFFER without first advertising snapshot-sync capability.

assertions.description: Reader rejects SNAPSHOT_OFFER because the seed did not advertise snapshot-sync capability.
Reader does not write an invalid manifest or snapshot object after the capability violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with the snapshot-side capability-negative optional-message proof.
The seed still publishes a snapshot object, but the generated transcript intentionally suppresses snapshot-sync from HELLO and MANIFEST.
